pages.notes: Index page mapping diary page numbers to places visited. Entry 57: second line could be 'Enclosed priories' or similar. Entry 73: place name unclear, possibly 'Vensley'. Entry 74: first place could be 'Corbignan' or 'Corbigny'. Entry 82: 'Plateau de la [?]Ville [?Vachon]' — last word(s) unclear. Entry 85: could read 'Omberley' or 'Ombersley'. Entry 86: last line partially obscured. Year '2017' appears in right margin next to entry ~77 area on left page.

pages.notes: Continuation of index page from left side. Year '2017' annotated in margin next to entry 96. Entry 99 has a tilde prefix (~99). Entry 100: 'Montalcismo' likely Montalcino. Entry 101: word before 'Pienza' looks like 'Pian' but may be a strikethrough/correction. Entry 104: 'Trasemene' is Trasimeno. Entry 108: 'Frejus' appears twice — first instance struck through. Entry 109: second line unclear, possibly 'Haz. Vaux' or 'Haut. Vaux' or 'St. Jean de Luz/Vaux'. Entry 114: last word could be 'Martin' (as in Compton Martin). Some entries on left column bleed into right image margin (gutter overlap).
